response.justification: Strong generalist software craftsman with 10+ years of full-stack experience, recent exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflows, and solid TypeScript/Node.js depth. However, the resume shows limited evidence of production-grade GenAI delivery, no explicit work with vector databases or RAG architectures, minimal Python, and no demonstrated cloud-native AI system design on AWS/GCP/Azure at the depth a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role demands. Worth a screening call to probe recent Acme AI-agent work.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at Acme
Deep TypeScript/Node.js background plus AWS CDK and microservices experience handling millions of req/s
Strong customer-facing and mentoring track record (workshops, courses, open-source platform leadership)
concerns: No explicit Python, vector database, or RAG production experience listed
Limited evidence of building evaluation pipelines or LLM observability frameworks
GenAI exposure appears recent and shallow relative to an 8+ year production AI requirement

key_factors.factor: Missing core GenAI stack (Python, RAG, vector DBs)
Recent MCP and agent infrastructure work
